storeDesc.message:
**The simplest and most reliable volume booster**

🚀 Features

⭐️ Up to 600 % volume boost
⭐️ Control volume of any tab
⭐️ Voice boost - makes dialogues and podcasts easier to hear
⭐️ Fine-grained control: 0 % - 600 %
⭐️ Switch to any tab playing audio with just one click

🚀 What users say

⭐️ "Does exactly what it says it does."
⭐️ "Tried a couple. This one was the best. Thanks!"
⭐️ "What I love about it that it just works :)"
⭐️ "Exactly what I was looking for!"
⭐️ "Definitely the best one and works flawlessly."
⭐️ "I can finally listen to everything I want. I highly recommend it."

⁉️Dear user, please note:

A few videos may become silent after using the add-on due to the error: "The HTMLMediaElement passed to createMediaElementSource has a cross-origin resource, the node will output silence." Unfortunately, we haven't been able to resolve this issue for years.😟It might be a Firefox bug.

Please be patient.🙏Reload the page with the video, and it should play again.
